title: Aurora, 99221, Palm Pals Frosty Snowflake, 5In, Soft Toy, Blue
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable Frosty Snowflake soft toy made with high quality materials
Collectible beanie soft toy which fits in the palm of your hand
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: This cute Frosty Snowflake fits into the palm of your hand, full of beans which makes for a super soft and cuddly soft toy. With a soft blue and white plush material body. This is a super cute playful Frosty Snowflake soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Frosty Snowflake. Frosty Snowflake is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
